meaning: n.[植]鸡蛋花,从鸡蛋花中提炼出来的香料
examples: But did he just lie back and smell the frangipani?
In this outdoor area is the out door pool and frangipani garden.
The main section of the house is separated by the out door pool and frangipani garden.
There are more Vietnamese than westerners at this handsome place in a colonial-style building with a frangipani-shaded courtyard.
Frangipani implements a rainwater recycling system to water its sustainable gardens and uses solar panels to reduce energy use.
